result.finding: validation/longchain_closure.py (BREAKTHROUGH): the 2-pool + free per-congener f_xy + active carrier reproduces the long chains at log10 RMSE 0.081 (saturated 3-param fit = structural adequacy, NOT a-priori prediction). The earlier 'unresolvable' was an artifact of holding f_xy fixed and only adding the non-subtractable lipid term; a LOW f_xy (root retention) and an ENHANCED carrier (uptake) are independent levers. Per congener -- PFDA(C10) f_xy 0.139 carrier 1.1x root 4.2/4.2 straw 3.0/3.5 grain 3.4/3.4; PFUnDA(C11) f_xy 0.100 carrier 1.3x root 19.6/19.5 straw 7.3/8.2 grain 3.1/3.1; PFDoDA(C12) f_xy 0.436 carrier 2.8x root 70.9/69.3 straw 29.2/49.7 grain 45.5/45.5. PFDoDA straw is the lone residual (f_xy at its ceiling of 1). The diet-relevant congener range has no structural blind spot.
